expectations.text: Should classify as Feature Request with enhancement label, not bug report
expectations.evidence: Step 1 classifies as 'Feature Request' with label 'enhancement'. Clear rationale: user explicitly said 'feature request'.

expectations.text: Should capture the user's use case (YAML readability, comment support) in the issue body
expectations.evidence: Step 4 '使用场景' section details YAML benefits: inline comments, human-friendly syntax, documentation of config choices, complex nested structures.

expectations.text: Should use structured template with use case and proposed solution sections
expectations.evidence: Issue body has '描述', '使用场景', '建议方案' sections matching the Feature Request template from SKILL.md. Includes environment info footer.

expectations.text: Should present composed issue for user privacy review before submission
expectations.evidence: Step 5 '隐私审查（必须）' shows full issue content with target repo, title, body, label, and 3-option confirmation prompt.

notes: Clean 7-step execution. Good expansion of user's brief request into detailed use case with specific examples. Proper 'enhancement' label.
